title: Mendo
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Youmay|the [[Nagai/Legends|Nagai]] guard|[[Menndo]], a [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]]}} {{Character |type= |image=[[File:Mendo.jpg]] |name=Mendo |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], [[Kinooine/Legends|Kinooine]][[Star Wars (1977) 96|''Star Wars'' (1977) 96]] |species=[[Nagai/Legends|Nagai]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Black]] |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation= |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|I wonder where Mendo got to..."
"He better be inside. Otherwise, he'll be in real trouble.|Rei and Taru|}} '''Mendo''' was a [[Nagai/Legends|Nagai]] guard assigned to the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lady]] [[Lumiya]]'s base on the planet [[Kinooine/Legends|Kinooine]], alongside fellow Nagai [[Taru]] and [[Rei]]. In [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], Mendo was keeping watch outside the base when he was stabbed through the chest by the [[Iskalonian]] [[Kiro]], an [[Alliance of Free Planets]] agent who was attempting to rescue [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], a captive of Lumiya's. Rei and Taru searched for their missing comrade, and both met similar fates. ==Appearances== *[[Star Wars (1977) 96|''Star Wars'' (1977) 96]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 96}} {{1st}} ==Sources== *{{GamerCite|1|The University of Sanbra Guide to Intelligent Life: The Marvel Series}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Mendo#legends }} [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Nagai]]
